_comment: task-bakeoff baked report deck — a tiny deterministic 3-scene slidey deck standing in for the report eval_pilot_report.py would build from the rollup. Real scene types (title / cards / narrative) so slidey emits a real .semantic.json sidecar. Used by flows so host.slidey.render need not run live (tour-needs-baked-world lesson).

scenes.title: Bake-off Report
scenes.subtitle: Same tasks, identical conditions, scored cells
scenes.narration: A controlled matrix comparison: the same tasks under identical conditions, every cell scored on outcome, compliance, cost, and time.

scenes.title: Three axes → cells
scenes.narration: Every cell is a task crossed with a candidate crossed with a contender.

scenes.body: Per-cell results aggregate into a summary — solve rate, cost, tokens, wall time — by treatment and by candidate.
scenes.lede: Structure isn't automatically cheaper, but it's more thorough.
scenes.narration: The per-cell results aggregate into a summary by treatment and by candidate: solve rate, cost, tokens, and wall time.
